name: claude-session-bridge
description: Bridge local Claude Code sessions into Codex through safe scanning, overlay metadata, terminal links, and a local session UI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Claude Code sessions with local views and terminal links.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for scanning Claude Code JSONL transcripts, keeping Codex-side aliases and archive state, listing Claude background agents, returning clickable Terminal resume links, and serving a local Working/Complete session view.
defaultPrompt: List my recent Claude Code sessions.
Read metadata for this Claude session.
Prepare a dry-run Claude resume command with a model override.
